_note: OPTIONAL example. A 'morning digest' automation for any desktop scheduler / automation runner that can run scheduled Copilot prompts and post to a chat channel. Import it into your scheduler and adjust the %USERPROFILE% paths (and notification target) to your environment. NOT required to run the Dream - the Windows Scheduled Task in triggers/install-scheduled-task.ps1 is the primary nightly trigger.
name: Dream morning digest

steps.label: Report Dream health + what to review, to chat
steps.prompt:
Run this shell command and capture its JSON:

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File %USERPROFILE%\.copilot\dream\dream-status.ps1 -Json

Then read the newest journal in %USERPROFILE%\.copilot\dream\journal\ (today's <YYYY-MM-DD>.md). Send me a chat message to self titled 'Dream <verdict>' (verdict = GREEN/YELLOW/RED from the JSON) containing, skimmable: the journal age; the journal '## Summary' line; the skills edited last night; any promotions/decays; and the file names of anything in %USERPROFILE%\.copilot\dream\review-queue\ awaiting my approval. If verdict is RED or the journal is stale, lead with the JSON 'issues' array and the last 5 lines of %USERPROFILE%\.copilot\dream\logs\run-<today>.log so I can fix it fast. Do not narrate in chat - the message is the only output.
